server.name: 1Stay Hotels
server.description: Real-time hotel search and booking via MCP. The first MCP server that completes real hotel reservations inside AI conversations.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search hotels worldwide by location and dates. All hotel types: major brands (Marriott, Hilton, IHG, Hyatt, Wyndham, Best Western, Choice), boutique, and independent properties. Guests pay the hotel directly. Loyalty points always apply. Hotel's own confirmation number.

location.description: City, address, venue, or landmark. Required unless latitude/longitude provided.

latitude.description: Latitude — skip geocoding if provided with longitude

longitude.description: Longitude — skip geocoding if provided with latitude

chain_code.description: Filter by hotel chain code (e.g. 'MC' for Marriott, 'HH' for Hilton)

search_id.description: Search ID from previous results — pass with cursor for next page

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from previous search response

tools.name: get_hotel_details
tools.description: Get room types, live rates, amenities, cancellation policies, and rate_codes for a specific hotel. Required before booking — rate_codes expire in ~15 minutes. Guests pay the hotel directly. A 1Stay Booking Fee is added at checkout.

tools.name: book_hotel
tools.description: Book a hotel room. Returns a secure checkout URL — guest completes payment there. NEVER collect credit card numbers, payment info, or billing details in conversation. Guest pays the hotel directly. Hotel's own confirmation number. Loyalty points apply automatically. Requires rate_code from get_hotel_details (expires ~15 min).

hotel_id.description: Hotel ID from search or details results

rate_code.description: Rate code from get_hotel_details — you MUST call get_hotel_details first to get a valid rate_code before booking

guest_name.description: Full name of the primary guest

guest_phone.description: Phone number for the primary guest

external_reference_id.description: Your unique reference ID for this booking (for idempotency and retrieval)

tools.name: get_booking
tools.description: Look up a reservation by booking ID (stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number. Returns full booking details including hotel, dates, guest info, rate, and status. Scoped to bookings made through your API key. For guest-facing reservation lookups, use retrieve_booking which enforces identity verification.

booking_id.description: Booking ID (e.g. stk_bk_xxxx) or hotel confirmation number

tools.name: cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel a hotel reservation. Cannot be undone. Requires guest first and last name plus hotel confirmation number. Always confirm with the guest before proceeding. Cancellation confirmation is emailed to the address on file.

first_name.description: Guest first name on the reservation

last_name.description: Guest last name on the reservation

tools.name: retrieve_booking
tools.description: Find a reservation and resend the confirmation email. Requires identity verification: guest's first and last name plus at least one verification factor (email address used at booking, hotel confirmation number, or last four digits of card used). Does not return booking details in conversation — confirmation is sent to the email on file to protect guest privacy.

email.description: Email address used when booking (optional verification factor)

last_four_card.description: Last 4 digits of card used to book (must also provide check_in_date)

check_in_date.description: Check-in date in YYYY-MM-DD format (required when using last_four_card verification)

updated_email.description: Resend confirmation to a different email address

tools.name: search_tools
tools.description: List available 1Stay hotel booking tools. Filter by keyword: search, book, cancel, details. Omit keyword to list all tools.

keyword.description: Keyword to filter tools (e.g. 'book', 'search', 'cancel'). Omit to list all tools.
